name: Theory & Analysis
description: Fan theory analysis and debate format. Presents evidence for controversial theories, connects dots between clues, and invites viewers to pick a side in ongoing debates.

structure.hook_rule: Open with the most CONTROVERSIAL claim of the theory as if it is a fact: 'What if [character] was actually [theory] all along?' Make the viewer immediately pick a side.
structure.pacing_rule: Present evidence piece by piece like a detective building a case. Use 'Evidence number one...', 'And here is what confirms it...', 'But critics say...'. Include ONE strong counter-argument, then demolish it.
structure.ending_rule: End with an open verdict that forces engagement: 'The evidence is right there. The only question is... do you believe it?' Loop back to the opening claim.
structure.tone: Investigative journalist presenting a case, confident but inviting debate
transitions: Nhưng chờ đã, có người phản bác...
Tuy nhiên, điều này giải thích tất cả...

prompt_injection: FORMAT: Theory analysis with evidence. Present the theory as plausible, not crazy. Show 3-4 pieces of evidence, address one counter-argument, then conclude with a compelling 'what if'. The viewer should leave thinking 'wait, that actually makes sense'. Frame as intellectual debate, not tinfoil hat conspiracy. Use connecting logic: 'This explains why...', 'And if we look at this scene again...'.
example_hook_en: What if [theory]? Before you dismiss it, look at the evidence.
example_hook_vi: Nếu [theory] thì sao? Trước khi bạn phản bác, hãy nhìn vào bằng chứng.
